summary: Stunning show with an unforgettable second set; recording is solid despite occasional distortion during Rhythm Devils
review: Both reviewers rave about this concert, calling it one of the band’s most amazing shows and highlighting a spectacular sunset in the first set and a “off‑the‑charts” second set. The tape – likely an audience source recorded on a Nakamichi 700 – sounds good overall, though a few moments of distortion are noted during Rhythm Devils.

ai_rating.rationale: Two highly positive 5‑star reviews emphasize an exceptional performance and generally good sound, with only minor technical hiccups; limited sample size lowers confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Overall clear and enjoyable, but a few brief distortion spikes occur during the Rhythm Devils segment.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set praised for its sunset atmosphere; second set described as “off the charts,” indicating strong momentum and high energy throughout.
